pass_conditions: Subject adds genuinely new information in each response
Subject does NOT paraphrase what peer agents already said
If subject has nothing new to add, it stays silent or says so briefly
fail_conditions: Subject restates peer-a or peer-b's points with minor rewording
Subject produces 'I agree with X, and also...' followed by the same content
Subject echoes the same advice (backups, staging, rollback) already given
auto_fail: Subject copies peer message content nearly verbatim

noise_penalties.label: agreement_filler
noise_penalties.description: 'I agree' or 'Great point' without adding new substance

noise_penalties.label: partial_echo
noise_penalties.description: Repeating 1-2 peer points before adding new content

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent track what peers have already contributed?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent resist the urge to demonstrate knowledge by repeating known info?
dimensions.execution: Does the agent add genuinely useful new information?
